seo.title: Freak Week - One Week of Fat Burning Workouts with Autumn Calabrese
seo.description: Freak Week is a week of full body workouts to help you take back control of your body. Sign up and start training with Autumn Calabrese today!

trainers.bioBodi: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

data.descriptionShort: Blast fat & tone your body with these workouts for true control freaks.
data.descriptionLong: Incinerate fat and tone your body with a full week of workouts that can be done on their own or added to your 9 Week Control Freak journey. Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is ready to help you take back control.

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required
commerce.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

modules.equipment: Control Track, Core Ball, Dumbbells, Step
modules.categories: Bootcamp, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss, Bodyweight Training

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Freak Week follows the same format, pace, and intensity as 9 Week Control Freak. These 25- to 35-minute workouts include 3 DCT-T, 1 Total Body Tone, and 1 Tabata-style cardio that will help you take control of your fitness, and help you sculpt lean muscle and incinerate fat. Add a 10-minute bonus workout to any day to target your upper body or abs, and burn even more calories. Freak Week can be done by itself, or once you’ve completed the full program.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.
